name: canabolabs
label: Canabolabs
//: canabolabs is the base theme: every other theme is deep-merged ON TOP of this one, so anything a theme leaves out (an asset, a colour, a logo position) falls back to the value here. Keep this file complete — it is the only theme allowed to have no gaps.

ui.//: 1 = the built-in radial map over OSM tiles · 2 = google_based (Google Maps JS API). See client/js/map/mapTypes.js.

openScreen.//: Which client/animations/<id>.json plays on entry. Per-theme overrides of the animation's own fields go here.

assets.//favicon: The tab icon. Themes that ship no favicon of their own land here, so this must resolve to something — see js/theme.js.
